CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( TEXT(Location__c) = "Onsite", (Date_of_Meeting__c - TODAY()) < 18, ISBLANK(Date_Submitted_For_Approval__c) ) , IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 15, 15)& " Violates Corp Travel Policy - Can it be done virtually?",
IF( AND( TEXT(Location__c) = "Onsite", (Date_of_Meeting__c - Date_Submitted_For_Approval__c) < 18, NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Submitted_For_Approval__c)) ) , IMAGE("/img/samples/color_red.gif", "red", 15, 15) & " Violates Corp Travel Policy - Can it be done virtually?", null ) )
CustomField.label: Policy Validation
